mapper.select:
select * from ( SELECT con.companyId, con.companyName, com.piccFlg, com.piccCreditAmount, com.daDiCreditAmount, com.usedCreditAmount, com.liabilityFlg, com.accessReportFlg, com.creditRating, com.creditCategory, con.creditOrdersNum, con.contractStartDate, con.receiveAmount, con.overdueAmount, con.overdueDays7, con.overdueDays15, con.overdueDays30, con.deptId, con.matchUserId, con.matchUserName, if((con.receiveAmount-com.piccCreditAmount)>0,con.receiveAmount-com.piccCreditAmount,0) excessAmount, if((con.receiveAmount-com.piccCreditAmount)>0,con.receiveAmount-com.piccCreditAmount,0)*if(che.grossProfitMargin>0,che.grossProfitMargin,0) excessGrossProfit, ROUND(if((con.receiveAmount-com.piccCreditAmount)>0,con.receiveAmount-com.piccCreditAmount,0)/com.piccCreditAmount*100,2) excessRate, bs_credit.creditType, bs_credit.creditAmount, bs_credit.usedCreditAmount2, bs_credit.effectiveDate, bs_credit.expiryDate, bs_credit.temporaryAmount, bs_credit.temporaryExpiryDate, bs_credit.enableFlg, bs_credit.createdUserId, bs_credit.createdUserName FROM ( SELECT company_id AS companyId, company_name AS companyName, COUNT(*) AS creditOrdersNum, MIN(contract_time) AS contractStartDate, SUM(total_amount-dealed_amount) receiveAmount, SUM(if(orverdur_flg = true,total_amount-dealed_amount,0)) overdueAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN breach_days >= 7 AND breach_days < 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueDays7, SUM(CASE WHEN breach_days >= 15 AND breach_days < 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueDays15, SUM(CASE WHEN breach_days >= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueDays30, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(dept_id ORDER BY contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS deptId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(match_user_id ORDER BY contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS matchUserId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(match_user_name ORDER BY contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS matchUserName FROM t_ctr_contract WHERE business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND contract_type = 'S' AND match_credit_flg = true AND contract_status != 'C' AND status != 'C' GROUP BY company_id ) con LEFT JOIN ( SELECT id companyId, company_name companyName, if(picc_flg=1, true, false) piccFlg, if(picc_flg=1,picc_credit_amount,'500000.00') piccCreditAmount, da_di_credit_amount daDiCreditAmount, used_credit_amount usedCreditAmount, if(access_report_flg=1,'是','否') accessReportFlg, if(actual_guarantee_flg=1,'是','否') liabilityFlg, credit_rating creditRating, credit_category creditCategory FROM t_bs_company ) com ON com.companyId = con.companyId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id companyId, gross_profit_margin grossProfitMargin from t_company_business_expansion ) che on con.companyId = che.companyId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id companyId, enterprise_id enterpriseId, credit_type creditType, credit_amount creditAmount, used_credit_amount usedCreditAmount2, effective_date effectiveDate, expiry_date expiryDate, temporary_amount temporaryAmount, temporary_expiry_date temporaryExpiryDate, enable_flg enableFlg, created_user_id createdUserId, created_user_name createdUserName FROM t_bs_company_credit ) bs_credit ON con.companyId = bs_credit.companyId ) com_result where 1=1
order by com_result.excessAmount desc
